title: Boat Rental in Abu Dhabi: A Complete Guide for 2026
html:
Choosing the right boat to rent in Abu Dhabi can transform your day on the Arabian Gulf. Departing from Yas Marina, you can expect prices from around 400 AED for a shared tour to over 5,000 AED for a crewed yacht. BoatHire24 offers a platform to compare verified listings and find the perfect vessel for your plans.

Where to set off in Abu Dhabi

Abu Dhabi’s coastline is dotted with modern marinas and natural anchorages. Yas Marina, home to the Formula 1 circuit, provides a glamorous departure point with full facilities. Abu Dhabi Marina on the Corniche offers easy access to the city’s skyline. For a more relaxed setting, try the Eastern Mangrove Marina, which opens onto the protected mangroves. Saadiyat Island’s new marina is ideal for those heading to the cultural district, while Al Bateen Marina serves as a gateway to the outer islands like Al Maya Island.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motor yacht, For luxury cruising and entertaining; sleeps up to 12; from 3,000 AED for a half-day.
  2. RIB or speedboat, For adrenaline and watersports; seats up to 8; from 800 AED for two hours.
  3. Sailing catamaran, For stable, spacious daysailing; up to 12 guests; from 2,500 AED for a half-day.
  4. Fishing boat, For angling trips around Zaya Nurai Island; up to 6; from 1,200 AED for a half-day.
  5. Luxury superyacht, For full-day charters with crew; 12+ guests; from 8,000 AED per day.

For a well-equipped option, consider this motor yacht, a 52-foot Azimut that seats up to 12 and includes a flybridge and cabins.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Abu Dhabi?

Prices vary widely depending on the boat type, duration, and season, with options for every budget. Here is a typical price-band breakdown:

  • Shared boat tour: from 200 AED per person (2 hours).
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from 800 AED.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): from 3,000 AED for a 40-foot Lagoon.
  • Crewed yacht half-day (includes skipper and fuel): from 4,000 AED for a Sunseeker.

If you want to compare options, rent a boat in Abu Dhabi through BoatHire24’s transparent listings to find the best rates for your chosen date.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Abu Dhabi?

For most boats over 12 metres or with engines above 40 hp, a valid licence is required, but many rentals include a skipper. If you hold an International Certificate of Competence (ICC) or a local licence, you may drive yourself. For bareboat charters, the operator will specify the required credentials. A local tip: book a crewed vessel to avoid paperwork and enjoy local knowledge of the waters around Lulu Island.

In the high season from November to March, the Shamal wind can pick up in the afternoon, so plan morning departures for calmer seas.

When is the best season to rent a boat in Abu Dhabi?

The ideal period is from November to March, when daytime temperatures range from 24 to 30 degrees and the sea is calm. The summer months (June to September) can be extremely hot, with temperatures exceeding 40 degrees, but early morning or sunset trips are still possible. The Shamal wind occasionally affects the Arabian Gulf, but sheltered areas like the mangroves remain navigable.

At a glance

  • Price band: 200 AED shared tour to 8,000+ AED luxury yacht
  • Peak months: November to March
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 30+ depending on vessel
  • Currency: AED
  • Popular boat models: Azimut, Sunseeker, Lagoon, Axopar

Questions about boat rental in Abu Dhabi

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Abu Dhabi?

Yes, many boats are available with a skipper who handles navigation and safety, so no licence is required from you.

What is the distance to Zaya Nurai Island from Abu Dhabi Marina?

The island lies about 15 nautical miles from Abu Dhabi Marina, taking roughly 45 minutes in a fast boat or 90 minutes on a sailing catamaran.

Are there any boat rental companies with offices at Yas Marina?

Most major operators have a presence at Yas Marina, offering online booking through platforms like BoatHire24 for ease of reservation.

Can I charter a boat for a sunset cruise in the Corniche area?

Absolutely; sunset cruises are popular and typically depart from Abu Dhabi Marina, with many yachts offering dinner options.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Abu Dhabi or list your own. To explore all available vessels, browse the listings on BoatHire24. If you own a boat, you can list it to reach thousands of travellers planning their 2026 holidays.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Abu Dhabi and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
